text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 Tasnim News Agency: The Iranian delegation in Islamabad did not discuss nuclear issues, and the absence of the head of the Atomic Energy Organisation was a clear signal. Tehran’s strategy never included nuclear talks; the U.S. raised the issue but Iran passed over it. The delegation focused on political, military, economic and legal matters. @wfwitness

She also added that such actions only amount to piracy. tweet

text: OSINTdefender According to a release from U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM), the U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz has directed 29 vessels to turn back or return to port since the beginning of the blockade on vessels traveling to or leaving Iranian ports. Per the release, CENTCOM has refuted past reporting that a number of ships passed the blockade, saying that the M/V Hero II and M/V Hedy are instead docked at Iran’s Chabahar port after being directed to turn back. Additionally, in confirmation of reporting from yesterday, CENTCOM has said that the M/V Dorena is currently under the escort of a U.S. Navy destroyer in the Indian Ocean. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：根据美国中央司令部（CENTCOM）发布的消息，自对前往或离开伊朗港口的船只实施封锁以来，美国对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁已导致29艘船只掉头或返回港口。根据该发布，中央司令部反驳了此前关于多艘船只通过封锁的报道，称“M/V Hero II”号和“M/V Hedy”号在被要求掉头后，目前停靠在伊朗的恰巴哈尔港。此外，为了证实昨天的报道，中央司令部表示，“M/V Dorena”号目前正在印度洋由一艘美国海军驱逐舰护航。推文

text: Open Source Intel CENTCOM: U.S. forces have turned back 29 vessels under the Iran blockade and denied reports that Hero II, Hedy, and Dorena bypassed enforcement. It said Hero II and Hedy are anchored in Chah Bahar after interception, while Dorena is under U.S. Navy escort in the Indian Ocean. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047031262670389497/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：中央司令部：美军在伊朗封锁行动下已拦截了29艘船只，并否认了关于“Hero II”号、“Hedy”号和“Dorena”号绕过封锁的报道。它表示，“Hero II”号和“Hedy”号在被拦截后停泊在恰巴哈尔，“Dorena”号目前正在印度洋接受美国海军护航。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047031262670389497/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Israeli officials say the gap between the U.S. and Iran is too wide to bridge diplomatically. No realistic path to a deal unless one side makes a major concession. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：以色列官员表示，美国和伊朗之间的分歧太大，无法通过外交手段弥合。除非一方做出重大让步，否则没有达成协议的现实途径。推文

text: U.S. Central Command U.S. forces have directed 29 vessels to turn around or return to port as part of the U.S. blockade against Iran. Over past 24 hours, media reports have alleged that several commercial ships evaded the blockade, citing M/V Hero II, M/V Hedy, and M/V Dorena as examples. These reports are inaccurate. Hero II and Hedy did not sail past the blockade as part of a flotilla that “ferried” millions of barrels of oil to the market. In fact, the Iranian-flagged tankers are anchored in Chah Bahar, Iran, after being intercepted by U.S. forces earlier this week. Dorena has been under the escort of a U.S. Navy destroyer in the Indian Ocean after previously attempting to violate the blockade. The U.S. military has global reach. American forces are operating and enforcing the blockade across the Middle East and beyond. tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部：作为美国对伊朗封锁的一部分，美军已指挥29艘船只掉头或返回港口。在过去24小时内，媒体报道称几艘商船规避了封锁，并以“M/V Hero II”号、“M/V Hedy”号和“M/V Dorena”号为例。这些报道是不准确的。“Hero II”号和“Hedy”号并没有作为向市场“运送”数百万桶石油的船队的一部分通过封锁。事实上，这些悬挂伊朗国旗的油轮在本周早些时候被美军拦截后，正停泊在伊朗的恰巴哈尔。“Dorena”号在之前试图违反封锁后，目前正在印度洋由一艘美国海军驱逐舰护航。美军拥有全球覆盖能力。美军正在中东及其他地区开展行动并执行封锁。推文

text: Visioner ‼️ 🇺🇲 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 BIG | U.S. B-1 strategic bombers continue to actively conduct training flights in the United Kingdom, near RAF Fairford airbase. It is likely that bombers operating out of Fairford would initiate a second round of strikes against Iran if negotiations ultimately collapse. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner ‼️ 🇺🇲 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 重大 | 美国B-1战略轰炸机继续在英国费尔福德皇家空军基地附近的英国领空积极进行训练飞行。如果谈判最终破裂，从费尔福德起飞的轰炸机很可能会对伊朗发动第二轮打击。与我们一起查看最新更新：@visionergeo 推文

This navy, which they claim was destroyed, is still strong and powerful today, and the enemy respects a distance of 300 kilometers from this navy. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: Visioner 🇺🇲 Information is circulating that at approximately 04:35 on April 22, from the launch site on Wallops Island (Virginia, USA), the American company Rocket Lab successfully carried out a launch of the “HASTE” launch vehicle with a hypersonic payload as part of the Bubbles program. The reported range reached 2,000 km. We are awaiting official statements on the matter. The previous launch was conducted on February 28. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇲 有消息称，4月22日约04:35，美国火箭实验室公司（Rocket Lab）从瓦勒普斯岛（美国弗吉尼亚州）发射场成功发射了“HASTE”运载火箭，搭载了作为“气泡”（Bubbles）计划一部分的高超音速载荷。据报道，射程达到了2000公里。我们正在等待关于此事的官方声明。上一次发射是在2月28日进行的。推文

text: Open Source Intel CBS Reports: U.S. intelligence sources say Iran retains more military capability than publicly acknowledged, with about half its ballistic missiles and launchers intact, and roughly 60% of IRGC naval forces still operational. tweet

text: Open Source Intel I wish I understood what actually happened on Friday. Trump posted that Iran agreed to hand over all nuclear material, never close the Strait of Hormuz, end its nuclear program forever, and abandon its proxies. But Iran didn’t agree to any of it. We know that because they didn’t even agree to show up to talks. So what actually happened behind the scenes? Pakistan giving over wrong info? tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：我真希望我能明白周五到底发生了什么。特朗普发帖称，伊朗同意交出所有核材料，绝不关闭霍尔木兹海峡，永远结束其核计划，并放弃其代理人。但伊朗并没有同意其中的任何一项。我们知道这一点，因为他们甚至没有同意参加会谈。那么幕后到底发生了什么？是巴基斯坦提供了错误信息吗？推文

text_zh: ❗️ 真主党今天在阿尔-曼苏里（Al-Mansouri）镇上空击落了4架小型以色列四轴无人机

text: 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Lebanese Member of Parliament Hussein Hajj Hassan : We are no longer committed to the ceasefire and will respond based on our assessment of the situation
text_zh: 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩议会议员侯赛因·哈吉·哈桑：我们不再遵守停火协议，并将根据我们对局势的评估做出回应

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Multiple statements coming out, but the message is clear: the days of Israeli impunity in Lebanon are over.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 多项声明相继发布，但信息很明确：以色列在黎巴嫩不受惩罚的日子已经结束了。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Hezbollah announces the targeting of a gathering of Israeli soldiers in Al-Qantara with an explosive drone achieving a direct hit. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 真主党宣布使用爆炸无人机袭击了位于阿尔坎塔拉（Al-Qantara）的以色列士兵聚集地，并直接命中目标。🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah has released another statement: In response to the Israeli ceasefire violation and drone strike in Yahmur Al Shaqif, we targeted a gathering of Israeli soldiers in Al-Qantara with an explosive drone achieving a direct hit. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah has released another statement: “In response to the Israeli ceasefire violations and breaches of Lebanese airspace, we shot down four Israeli reconnaissance drones in Al-Mansouri at 18:00.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 真主党发布了另一份声明：为回应以色列违反停火协议并在 Yahmur Al Shaqif 发动无人机袭击，我们用一架爆炸性无人机瞄准了 Al-Qantara 的以色列士兵聚集点，并实现直接命中。@wfwitness” ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党发布了另一份声明：“为回应以色列违反停火协议和侵犯黎巴嫩领空的行为，我们在 18:00 于 Al-Mansouri 击落了四架以色列侦察无人机。” @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Hezbollah announces the targeting of an Israeli Humvee in Qantara, southern Lebanon, with an FPV drone, achieving a direct hit 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 真主党宣布用 FPV 无人机瞄准了黎巴嫩南部 Qantara 的一辆以色列悍马车，并实现直接命中 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah has released another statement: In response to the Israeli ceasefire violation and drone strike in Yahmur Al Shaqif, we targeted a gathering of Israeli soldiers in Al-Qantara with an explosive drone achieving a direct hit. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Lebanese Member of Parliament Hussein Hajj Hassan: We are no longer committed to the ceasefire and will respond based on our assessment of the situation @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 真主党发布了另一份声明：为回应以色列违反停火协议并在 Yahmur Al Shaqif 发动无人机袭击，我们用一架爆炸性无人机瞄准了 Al-Qantara 的以色列士兵聚集点，并实现直接命中。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩议会议员侯赛因·哈吉·哈桑（Hussein Hajj Hassan）：我们不再遵守停火协议，并将根据我们对局势的评估做出回应 @wfwitness
